UNDERTALE - Battle System

You are a human who has fallen into the Underground, a world filled with monsters. Navigate through encounters with various monsters, but remember - you don't have to fight! Use the unique battle system to SPARE enemies by completing dialogue choices and dodging their attacks. Survive three monster encounters and escape to win. Each battle features timing-based dodging mechanics where you must avoid projectiles. Choose wisely: FIGHT deals damage, ACT opens mercy options, and SPARE lets enemies go when conditions are met.

Controls: Arrow Keys: Move your SOUL (red heart) to dodge attacks in battle / Navigate menu options | Z Key: Confirm menu selection / Advance dialogue | Space: Quick dodge (short cooldown) | Enter: Start game from main menu | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen from game over

UNDERTALE - Battle System

You are a human who has fallen into the Underground, a world filled with monsters. Navigate through encounters with various monsters, but remember - you don't have to fight! Use the unique battle system to SPARE enemies by completing dialogue choices and dodging their attacks. Survive three monster encounters and escape to win. Each battle features timing-based dodging mechanics where you must avoid projectiles. Choose wisely: FIGHT deals damage, ACT opens mercy options, and SPARE lets enemies go when conditions are met.

Controls: Arrow Keys: Move your SOUL (red heart) to dodge attacks in battle / Navigate menu options | Z Key: Confirm menu selection / Advance dialogue | Space: Quick dodge (short cooldown) | Enter: Start game from main menu | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen from game over
